---
title: "Posts"
subtitle: '<i class="bi bi-rss-fill" style="color: #ee802f;"></i> [RSS](posts.xml)'
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-placeholder: assets/placeholder.png
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<style>
/* Common card styles (unified)*/
.quarto-post .card,
.quarto-listing-cols-3 .card,
.quarto-grid-item,
.quarto-listing-container-default .quarto-post,
#quarto-margin-sidebar .quarto-listing-category {
  background: var(--background-secondary);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  box-shadow: 0 2px 16px var(--shadow);
  transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* Hover effect for cards */
.quarto-post .card:hover,
.quarto-listing-cols-3 .card:hover,
.quarto-grid-item:hover,
.quarto-listing-container-default .quarto-post:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(90, 103, 216, 0.13);
}

/* Typography & layout for listing container */
.quarto-listing .quarto-post {
  margin-bottom: 1em;
  padding-top: 0;
}

.quarto-grid-item .card-title,
.listing-title {
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
  font-weight: 400;
  color: var(--ink);
}

.listing-date,
.listing-author,
.card-text.listing-description {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: var(--muted);
}

.quarto-listing-container-default .metadata {
  width: 80px;
  flex-basis: 80px;
}

.quarto-listing-container-default .listing-author,
.quarto-listing-container-default .listing-date {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 400;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

/* Categories styling */
.listing-categories .listing-category {
  background: var(--accent-light);
  color: var(--accent);
  border: none;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  padding: 0.15em 0.6em;
}

/* Horizontal listing cards (default style)*/
.quarto-listing-container-default .quarto-post {
  padding: 1.1rem 1.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.quarto-listing-container-default .quarto-post:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

/* Remove default dividers */
.quarto-listing-container-default .quarto-post + .quarto-post {
  border-top: none;
}
.quarto-listing-container-default .list .quarto-post {
  border-bottom: none;
  padding-top: 1.1rem;
  padding-bottom: 1.1rem;
}

/* Thumbnail images */
.quarto-listing-container-default .thumbnail img {
  aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;
  object-fit: cover;
  width: 100%;
  border-radius: 6px;
}

/* Listing title */
.quarto-listing-container-default .listing-title a {
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
  font-weight: 400;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: var(--ink, #2d2d3a);
  text-decoration: none;
}
.quarto-listing-container-default .listing-title a:hover {
  color: var(--accent, #5a67d8);
}

/* Listing description */
.quarto-listing-container-default .listing-description {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--muted, #888);
  line-height: 1.65;
  margin-top: 0.3rem;
}

/* Author & date — reduced selector nesting, avoid !important */
.quarto-listing-container-default .listing-author,
.quarto-listing-container-default .listing-date {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 400;
  line-height: 1.5;
  font-family: sans-serif;
}

/* Metadata column width */
.quarto-listing-container-default .metadata {
  width: 90px;
  flex-basis: 90px;
}

/* Inline categories inside listing */
.quarto-listing-container-default .listing-categories {
  margin-top: 0.6rem;
}

.quarto-listing-container-default .quarto-post .listing-categories .listing-category {
  background: var(--accent-light, #ebedfa);
  color: var(--accent, #5a67d8);
  border: none;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  padding: 0.15em 0.6em;
}

/* Categories sidebar box */
#quarto-margin-sidebar {
  padding-top: 0;
}

#quarto-margin-sidebar .quarto-listing-category-title {
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 400;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent, #5a67d8);
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.4rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #e0e0ec);
}

#quarto-margin-sidebar .quarto-listing-category {
  padding: 1rem 1.1rem;
}

#quarto-margin-sidebar .quarto-category {
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.15rem;
}
#quarto-margin-sidebar .quarto-category.active {
  background-color: var(--accent, #5a67d8);
  border-color: var(--accent, #5a67d8);
  color: #fff;
}

/* Dark mode adjustments (both selectors) */
[data-quarto-color-scheme="dark"] .quarto-listing-container-default .quarto-post,
body.quarto-dark .quarto-listing-container-default .quarto-post,
[data-quarto-color-scheme="dark"] #quarto-margin-sidebar .quarto-listing-category,
body.quarto-dark #quarto-margin-sidebar .quarto-listing-category {
  background: var(--background-secondary, #161820);
}

/* Ensure dark mode does not alter these rules unless necessary */
[data-quarto-color-scheme="dark"] .quarto-listing-container-default .listing-author,
[data-quarto-color-scheme="dark"] .quarto-listing-container-default .listing-date,
body.quarto-dark .quarto-listing-container-default .listing-author,
body.quarto-dark .quarto-listing-container-default .listing-date {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 400;
  line-height: 1.5;
  font-family: sans-serif;
}

</style>
